授業方法: The course will be a combination of Lectures and Seminar.

第1回: Session 1) 【Startup Week】Online Class (On-demand format)《60 Minutes》Orientation, Introduction to India
第2回: Session 2) 【Core Weeks】  Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Course Introduction. Introducing India - Society & Culture (Seminar)
第3回: Session 3) 【Core Weeks】  Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Introducing India - Politics and Economy (Lecture)
第4回: Session 4) 【Core Weeks】  Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Why India-Japan? Civilizational Encounters and Early Contacts (Lecture and Discussion)
第5回: Session 5)  【Core Weeks】Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Indian Nationalism and Japan: Tagore, Bose and Okakura Tenshin (Lecture and Discussion)
第6回: Session 6) 【Core Weeks】  Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Tokyo Trial and Justice Radhabindod Pal (Lecture and Discussion)
第7回: Session 7) 【Core Weeks】  Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Cold War divergences and Limited Engagement (Lecture and Discussion)
第8回: Session 8) 【Core Weeks】  Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Economic Engagement and Complimentarities (Lecture and Discussion)
第9回: Session 9) 【Core Weeks】  Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Japanese ODA in India's Growth Story (Lecture and Discussion)
第10回: Session 10)  【Core Weeks】 Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Shinzo Abe and Confluence of Two Seas (Lecture and Discussion)
第11回: Session 11) 【Core Weeks】  Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Strategic Convergence in 21st Century (Lecture and Discussion)
第12回: Session 12)  【Core Weeks】Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》People-to-People Ties and Soft power (Lecture and Discussion)
第13回: Session 13)  【Core Weeks】Face-to-face class《90 Minutes》Future of India-Japan: Opportunities and Constraints (Seminar)
第14回: Session 14) 【Flex Hours】[DATE TO BE DECIDED] Face-to-face class 《120 Minutes》Student Presentation of Term Paper
第15回: Session 15) 【Flex Hours】 Online (On-demand format)《90 Minutes》Feedback Session
トピック.授業外学習2: Students will be required to read the essential readings that will be shared a week prior to designated class. Student will be required to write a Term Paper on any aspect of India-Japan relationship outside the class hours.

教科書/Required texts0:
The Indian national Army and Japan, Joyce Lebra, Iseas-Yusof Ishak Institute, 2008Building a Global Partnership: Fifty years of Indo-Japanese Relations, K.V. Kesavan, Lancers Books, 2004
Friends: India's Closest Strategic Partners (Japan Chapter), Sreeram Chaulia, Rupa, 2014India and Japan: A Natural Partnership in the Indo-Pacific, Harsh Pant and Madhuchanda Ghosh, Orient Blackswan, 2024
The India Way (Chapter 7: A Delayed Destiny), S. Jaishankar, HarperCollins, 2022India Today: Economy, Politics and Society, Stuart Corbridge, Polity Press, 2013
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Refer to Method of or Criteria for Evaluation Note
成績評価Grading2: 備考　Note Class engagement and quality of contribution: 20%MCQ format mid term quiz: 20% (Session 12 - 20 minutes 20 questions)Presentation of Term Paper: 20%Term Paper: 40% (Student needs to discuss for finalising topic before the 4th session)
